message:
feat(moe): add shotgun prefetch with token batch loader

Implement "Firehose" pattern for MoE expert loading:

- Token batch loader: 4 staging buffers (384MB each, 1.5GB total)
  keeping SSD queue full with up to 32 pending layers
- Shotgun prefetching: prefetch Top-4 router candidates instead
  of just Top-2 selected experts for higher cache hit rate
- Cache-first skip: only load via firehose if Top-2 selected
  experts are not already cached
- Async I/O thread racing ahead of GPU computation

Results: 0.35 TPS measured (17.5x faster than 0.02 TPS sync baseline)
- I/O volume: 2GB vs 150GB before cache optimization
- Cache hit rate: 65% VIP, 27-32/32 layers cached per token

Still 0.7x slower than single-layer prefetch (0.47 TPS) -
bottleneck has shifted from I/O to GPU compute/sync.
